rationale: The text "cafe\u0301" (Latin small letter e followed by a combining acute accent, U+0301) encoded as raw UTF-8 without NFC normalization. dCBOR's D8 requires NFC normalization (the precomposed "caf\u00e9" form); rfc8949-profile-1 has no such rule (P9 is an explicit non-goal), so this reason code is dcbor-only.
Text "e"+U+0301 (decomposed é); NFC composes to U+00E9.
Text "a"+U+0301+U+0323: combining marks in non-canonical order (CCC 230 before 220); NFC reorders (and composes) them.
Text U+212B (angstrom sign); NFC singleton-decomposes it to U+00C5 (Å).
Text "A"+U+030A (decomposed Å); NFC composes to U+00C5.
Text "o"+U+0301 (decomposed ó); NFC composes to U+00F3.
